# GitHub repository metadata (manual)

GitHub does not read this file automatically — it is a **copy-paste cheat
sheet** for the repository owner when editing the project on GitHub.

## “About” box

**Description** (short, plain English):

> Educational TLS fragmentation + DNS research tool for studying DPI
> behaviour. Linux (netfilter) and Windows (WinDivert). No hard-coded
> destinations — per-SNI strategies are learned at runtime. See
> `DISCLAIMER.md`.

**Website** (optional):

`https://github.com/byrdltd/whyDPI#readme`

**Topics** (suggested tags — pick what fits; GitHub allows many):

`dpi` `tls` `deep-packet-inspection` `networking` `research` `education`
`netfilter` `iptables` `windivert` `dns-over-https` `python`
`censorship` `transparency` `mitm` `packet-fragmentation`

Avoid topic spam; 8–12 well-chosen tags are enough for discoverability.

## Social preview

Repository **Settings → General → Social preview** — upload
`assets/logo.png` (horizontal) so link shares show the brand.
